creator: kargl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #14)
L> While on ld128:
> /usr/home/konstantinb/build/bsd/DEV/src/lib/msun/ld128/s_sinpil.c:63:19: error: > expected ';' after expression
>                                hi *= 0x1p113L

See the initial post about the ld128 version.  The ld128 code is untested and hasn't even been compiled by me as I no longer have access to a ld128 system. flame.freebsd.org was decommissioned years ago.  Is there a ld128 system available from freefall.freebsd.org?
